# emerge

## DO NOT USE THIS

This is a work-in-progress analysis of the 2026 Bundibugyo outbreak
centered on Ituri, DRC.

This is still undergoing quality assurance and should not be used for
any purpose.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`random_Rt_expq()`](https://nicholasdavies.github.io/emerge/reference/random_Rt_expq.md)
  : Get a random Rt series
